description_long: This is a modern, free-standing ATM machine with a robust rectangular form and a prominent red exterior casing. The front features a large display screen at the top, beneath which is a keypad and a card slot, all set within a black panel. Below the interactive area, there is a white panel with the ADCB bank logo and Arabic text, indicating clear bank branding. The sides are solid red with black insets, and the back is a plain red surface, giving the machine a clean, secure appearance. The ATM is designed for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments, with a sturdy build to withstand public use. The overall design is functional, with all user interaction points concentrated on the front face.
description: A robust, red, free-standing ATM with a black interactive front panel, display screen, keypad, card slot, and ADCB bank branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, keypad, card slot, receipt dispenser, and ADCB branding panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid red side with a large black inset panel and no interactive features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted red surface with no visible features or access points.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a solid red side and a large black inset panel.
attribute_screen_interface: A rectangular, landscape-oriented screen located at the top front, displaying a static image and some text, with no visible touch or button interface on the screen itself.
attribute_card_slot: A single horizontal card slot is visible below the screen and keypad, centrally located, with a dark border and no visible illumination or labeling.
attribute_keypad_layout: A compact rectangular keypad with a grid layout, positioned directly below the screen and above the card slot, featuring multiple square keys likely labeled with numbers and function keys.
attribute_bank_branding: ADCB bank branding is prominently displayed on a white panel at the lower front, with the ADCB logo and Arabic text in gray and red.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small horizontal slot below the keypad and card slot, likely for receipts, with a metallic or plastic trim and no visible labeling.
